EOF)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Service sshd | Select-Object Name, Status, StartType")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table")

Bash(schtasks /create /tn "InstallOpenSSH" /tr "powershell.exe -Command ""Add-WindowsCapability -Online -Name OpenSSH.Server~~~~0.0.1.0; Start-Service sshd; Set-Service -Name sshd -StartupType Automatic; New-NetFirewallRule -Name ''OpenSSH-Server-In-TCP'' -DisplayName ''OpenSSH Server'' -Enabled True -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -Action Allow -LocalPort 22""" /sc once /st 00:00 /ru SYSTEM /f)
